note: Community postings serving Fisher Hill. Reviewed before posting.

posts.title: Walworth Avenue Block Party
posts.summary: Fisher Hill's annual block party returns — food, music, a kids' zone, and a meet-your-neighbors table. Street closed to traffic.

posts.title: Fisher Hill Spring Cleanup Walk
posts.summary: Help clear litter, open walking paths, and prepare planting beds along the neighborhood greenway. Gloves and supplies provided.
